rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Walk-away test (M2+).
50% magic rule (M3-M8).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Module-set-level magic distribution; not judged at single-exercise scope.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Trust the agentic design — no human backstops.
Quality ladder.
One exercise = one bounded activity.
Modules composable across variants.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Library-composition rule; cross-variant include architecture not visible at single-exercise scope.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Three-level completeness.
Pattern-recognition LOs need n>=2 instances with contrast.
Progression-with-variations is the spine.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Cross-module move-variation check; needs sibling modules' instances of the move, not visible at single-exercise scope.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Student agency — adults decide.
Delegation — student brings, Claude screens.
Split mega-exercise when phases = distinct skills + distinct artifacts.
Artifact-realism check.
Teach principle + technique — default.
Auto-fire sim+eval after significant rewrite.
Forcing functions stay, scripted reactions go. Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
Corporate infra = nice-to-have, never forcing function.
Personal-first, team promotion via human conversation.
Measure silent failure, not just friction.
Don't pre-set categories before experiment runs.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-process rule (drafting eval categories), not a property of a shipped exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verification layers sample DIFFERENT error distributions.
Cheap-before-expensive verification ordering.
Rule in memory without forcing function = worse than no rule.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Memory/compendium-authoring meta-rule; not a property of a student-facing exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Short skeptical pushback on "done" = re-verify trigger.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-process behavior (orchestrator re-verifies on skeptical nudge); not a shipped-content property.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cohort execution is trainer-paced + concurrent, not sequential.
Host-skill optional; maintainer blocks trainer-only.
Reflection beats: in-chat over file-write.
Classroom = default delivery; body teaches work, trainer manages room.
Eval = fixed yardstick; thing measured learns.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Eval-loop integrity rule; no scorer/loop present in this exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Reading burden for verification = banned. Claude audits Claude.
Self-report + self-audit charity — verify at artifact, over-flag or fresh-session for critique.
Offered structures need forced-engagement mechanic.
Source-type blindness on ingestion.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No heterogeneous slide/deck ingestion in this exercise; STRIDE runs on the prior exercise's surface map.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Task selection drives outcome — name floor AND ceiling.
Maintainer-block hedge naming section's own failure mode = cut-signal, not warning.
Audience tier determines authoring substrate.
Verification machinery needs smoke-test before trust.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No new verification machinery (hook/judge/loop) built in this exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Context-loading tiers as staged progression.
Removals are strategic — ask before cutting.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-time removal-discipline rule; not a property of shipped content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Symmetric visible-mechanics > runtime fork when dual-runtime constraints break agentic move.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Agents 101 dual-runtime (Code/Cowork) rule; AE101 is CLI+Desktop, single agentic runtime, no fork in this exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Load-bearing platform feature = no fallback. Gate or redesign.
Eval architecture — partition by evidence source, not criterion count.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Eval-judge architecture meta-rule; governs judge design, not exercise content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Plug points + UX.
Per-exercise leap test — 3 observable Monday outcomes.
Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch.
Heavy fan-out prompts get body recovery callout.
Save belongs with authoring, not loading.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No create-then-use authoring pair in this exercise; STRIDE skill is installed at prework, not authored here.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Convenience-driven prompts with known shape-bias — body acknowledgment callout.
Deliberate-antipattern prompts = class-judge exempt, flagged-by-design.
Session widget — `**Session** *(verb, "name")*` shape; place by learning flow.
Widgets carry semantics, not just emphasis — match the widget to MEANING.
Pre-action framing doesn't preview prompt's payoff.
Engineer-audience audit fixes default to body callout, not forcing function.
Multi-session (any new mechanic mid-arc) ships as packaging, not new primitive.
`/clear` = tool, not ceremony.
Inbound links preserve pedagogical beat across reference restructuring.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No reference-page restructuring in this exercise; cross-exercise hand-offs are forward, not inbound link rewires.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Scan at the unit the rule names, not convenient larger one.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Audit-process discipline rule for the judge/auditor, not a property of shipped content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify mechanism before proposing surgery.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Generation-time mechanism-verification discipline; not a shipped-content property.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Acting on a flagged item — verify before fixing; its prescribed fix is a hypothesis.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Audit-action discipline for the orchestrator; not a property of the exercise body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Callouts next to prompts: steer, don't pre-empt.
Persistent TODO surfaces stale by default — audit before acting.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Punchlist-staleness audit discipline; not a property of shipped content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Maintainer blocks point, don't restate. Link architecture doc where they touch delivery.
